name: Bain & Company, Inc.
lede: Bain runs two centers across two Indian cities. Gurugram and Bengaluru, covering GBS and GCC/GIC, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bain office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bain & Company, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bain runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Gurugram, Bengaluru), covering GBS and GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Bain's India footprint covers Gurugram and Bengaluru, spanning GBS and GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Bain operate in India?
faq.a: Bain operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.a: Bain's India footprint includes Gurugram and 1 additional cities.

faq.a: Bain runs GBS and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Bain's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
